theory.canonical_statement: ID 494 confirms the scale invariant nature of the extracted energy and information. By verifying that the system's dynamics follow a power law distribution with the critical exponent D approx. 1.5, the reactor proves it is operating at the edge of chaos (self organized criticality). This confirms that the 17.2 kHz carrier is successfully entraining both microscopic and macroscopic modes. Fractal Persistence: Ensures that the "vibrating code" remains intact across multiple spatial scales. Cross Scale Coupling: Validates that the 153,600 node geometry is successfully mediating between vacuum and matter.
